'''Trenn Gant''' was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]].
Following the ambush of ''[[Tampion]]'' and the capture of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Gant, then attached to the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]], oversaw the debriefing of the [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] sent to escort ''Tampion''. His interrogation of pilots like [[Plat Mallar]] was thorough and detailed as he attempted to determine how the secret mission was compromised.<ref name="TT" />
